- 支持本地视频媒体库浏览、搜索、列表与网格切换
- 支持断点续播、画中画、手势控制和轨道记忆
- 支持 ASS 特效字幕、外挂字幕、字幕样式与编码调整
- 支持应用内语言切换、主题定制和设置备份恢复

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Added local video library browsing, search, and list or grid layouts
- Added resume playback, picture in picture, gesture controls, and track memory
- Added ASS subtitle effects, external subtitles, and subtitle style or encoding options
- Added in-app language switching, theme customization, and settings backup or restore

</details>
